hooks.command: jq -cr 'if ((.prompt // "") | test("\\b(deep research|research the web|web research|do research on|investigate online|research report)\\b"; "i")) then {hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "UserPromptSubmit", additionalContext: "Hint: this prompt looks like web research. Use /web-agent (focused lookup) or /deep-research (multi-iteration report) — both wrap tools/web-research/bin/."}} else empty end'
